changeSet.author: openelis-viral-vaccine

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true

changeSet.comment: Create Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory notebook template

column.name: objective
column.value: Complete Viral & Vaccine workflow from sample registration to culture

column.name: protocol
column.value: Standard Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory Protocol

column.name: content
column.value: Viral and Vaccine Unit Laboratory notebook template with workflow pages for sample registration, media preparation, sterilization, and viral culture.

delete.where: title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true

changeSet.author: openelis-viral-vaccine

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Creation & Registration page for Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Create the sample and assign it to the correct testing stream. Capture sample identity (Sample ID, Barcode, Batch association), sample metadata (Source - human/animal/environmental/lab-derived, Sample type, Date & time received, Received by), and testing intent (Test category - Viral/Bacterial, Intended workflow - Virus culture/Vaccine development/Bacteriology, Priority/project). System creates sample record, sets status to Registered, and routes to appropriate workflow.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 1

changeSet.author: openelis-viral-vaccine

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 2

changeSet.comment: Create Viral Media Preparation page for Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Prepare culture media for virus growth linked to the sample. Record media type, select reagents from inventory, specify equipment used, record preparer name and preparation date. System logs materials used and links media batch to sample for traceability.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 2

changeSet.author: openelis-viral-vaccine

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE workflow_category = 'VIRAL_VACCINE'

changeSet.comment: Insert predefined Viral & Vaccine Unit workflow page templates

column.name: description
column.value: Create the sample and assign it to the correct testing stream

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Capture sample identity (Sample ID, Barcode, Batch), sample metadata (Source, Type, Received date/time, Received by), and testing intent (Test category, Intended workflow, Priority/project). System creates sample record and routes to appropriate workflow.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Sample Creation & Registration - Entry point for Viral & Vaccine Unit samples

column.name: description
column.value: Prepare culture media for virus growth linked to the sample

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Record media type, select reagents from inventory, specify equipment used, record preparer and date. System logs materials and links media batch to sample.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Viral Media Preparation - Culture media preparation for virus growth
